name: POPKID-XTR
description: WhatsApp bot made by Popkid from Kenya

SESSION_ID.description: Put your POPKID~ session ID here.

STICKER_NAME.description: The name appearing on stickers created by the bot.

CUSTOM_STATUS_EMOJIS.description: Emojis used for status reactions, separated by commas.

MODE.description: Select bot work type: public, private, inbox, or group.

ALWAYS_ONLINE.description: Set to true to show the bot as always online.

AUTO_STATUS_REPLY.description: Send a reply message when you view a status.

AUTO_STATUS_MSG.description: The message sent as an auto-reply to status views.

ANTI_DELETE.description: Enable Anti-Delete to prevent message loss.

ANTI_DEL_PATH.description: Set to 'log' for private DM logs or 'chat' for same-chat recovery.

OWNER_NAME.description: The name of the bot owner.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: The WhatsApp number of the owner (include country code).

BOT_NAME.description: The display name of your bot.

ANTI_LINK.description: Automatically remove users who send group links.

MENU_IMAGE_URL.description: The direct URL for the bot's menu image.

AUTO_REACT.description: Bot reacts to every incoming message.

READ_MESSAGE.description: Automatically mark incoming messages as read.

AUTO_BIO.description: Automatically update the bot's bio with live time.
